sentences.translation: Sulejman je praštao onome ko ga je naspudio.
sentences.translationEn: Sulayman used to forgive those who harmed him.

sentences.translation: Rekao je prijatelju: Oprost smiruje srce.
sentences.translationEn: He told his friend: Forgiveness brings peace to the heart.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَحْمِلْ ضَغِينَةً فِي قَلْبِهِ تِجَاهَ أَحَدٍ.
sentences.translation: Nije nosio mržnju u srcu prema nikome.
sentences.translationEn: He did not hold grudges in his heart toward anyone.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ مَحْبُوبًا بَيْنَ النَّاسِ لِهَذَا الْخُلُقِ الْجَمِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Bio je voljen među ljudima zbog ove lijepe osobine.
sentences.translationEn: He was loved among people for this beautiful quality.
